feature: RL-driven model selection & token budget management for hex-agent

phases.name: Domain & Port layer - RL types, token budgets, reward modeling

tasks.name: Define RlPort trait with select_action/report_reward methods, RlState/RlAction/RlReward types
Implement ModelSelection and ContextStrategy enums with parsing logic
Create TokenBudget, TokenPartition, ContextStrategy application logic
Extend api_optimization domain with rate limit state tracking for RL signals

phases.name: Secondary adapters - RL client and noop fallback

tasks.name: Implement RlClientAdapter with HTTP calls to /api/rl/action and /api/rl/reward
Implement NoopRlAdapter returning Sonnet + balanced context as default

phases.name: Usecase integration - wire RL into conversation loop

tasks.name: Integrate RL query → model selection → budget adjustment → API call → reward reporting in conversation loop
Implement fallback chain (Opus→Sonnet→MiniMax→Haiku→Local) with 429 handling and reward penalties
Add model-pinning override logic (--model flag bypasses RL model selection)
